_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
commits: feat(cycle-22): merlin lair hub + candle VFX + sfx audio + cotes batch2
notes: Cycle 22 MERLIN LAIR HUB. T062: MerlinLairScene.ts — full 3D stone interior, 4 raycaster click zones (map/crystal/bookshelf/door), hover scale 1.05 + cursor:pointer, fixed camera with 0.3Hz sway. T064: 3 candles each with 20 orange particles upward drift + 3-frequency flicker, 80 dust motes, cauldron green steam 30 particles, 3 emissive potion bottles, skull. T058: SFXManager.ts — Web Audio API procedural tones (flip/win/lose/unlock/end), AudioContext autoplay-compliant, silent-fail. State machine: BOOT→MENU→LAIR→GAME in main.ts. index.html: #lair-canvas-wrapper + #lair-tooltip. cotes_sauvages batch2: 20 cards, 366 total, all constraints PASS. Bundle: 108.88→123.07KB app (+14KB, +13% WARN). TS: 0 errors. Build: 2.82s. All gates PASS.
